name: Sarah Chen
bio: Former manager who taught me everything about product management. Runs a startup accelerator now.

name: Marcus Williams
bio: College roommate for 4 years. We survived engineering together. Now works as civil engineer in Seattle.

name: Priya Patel
bio: My younger sister. She just got engaged and we're planning the wedding together. Lives in Chicago.

name: David Kim
bio: Co-founder of my previous startup. We built and sold our company together. Still advise each other.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: UI/UX designer who helped rebrand my last project. Incredible creative mind and close friend.

name: James Wilson
bio: Lead pastor at my church. Has been my spiritual mentor for 5 years. We meet monthly for breakfast.

name: Maya Johnson
bio: Run a food bank together. She's the most selfless person I know. Planning our summer fundraiser.

name: Alex Thompson
bio: Angel investor who funded my first business. Gives incredible strategic advice. Lives in NYC.

name: Nina Gupta
bio: Met during first week of law school. She kept me sane through exams. Now a corporate attorney.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: Tech journalist who wrote about my company. We stayed friends and record a monthly podcast together.

name: Rachel Green
bio: Known her since kindergarten. Our parents are still neighbors. She's a pediatric nurse now.

name: Oliver Zhang
bio: Won 3 hackathons together. He's a robotics engineer and we're building an AI side project.

name: Tiffany Brooks
bio: My personal trainer who became a close friend. She pushes me to be better every single day.

name: Brian Foster
bio: Fraternity big brother. He introduced me to my wife. We try to golf together every month.

name: Sophia Lee
bio: Curator at modern art museum. She's teaching me to appreciate art. We attend gallery openings together.
